query:
UPDATE requests r
               SET state = 'completed',
                   response_status = v.status,
                   response_body = v.body,
                   response_size = v.size,
                   completed_at = NOW()
              FROM UNNEST(
                  $1::uuid[], $2::text[], $3::bigint[], $4::smallint[]
              ) AS v(id, body, size, status)
             WHERE r.id = v.id AND r.state = 'processing'
            RETURNING r.id
